statements.query: MATCH (n:AzureDevOpsBranch)<-[:BRANCH]-(:AzureDevOpsRepo)<-[:HAS_REPO]-(:AzureDevOpsProject)<-[:HAS_PROJECT]-(:AzureDevOpsOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID}) WHERE n.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (n) return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted

MATCH (:AzureDevOpsBranch)<-[r:BRANCH]-(:AzureDevOpsRepo)<-[:HAS_REPO]-(:AzureDevOpsProject)<-[:HAS_PROJECT]-(:AzureDevOpsOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID}) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r) return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted

MATCH (n:AzureDevOpsRepo)<-[:HAS_REPO]-(:AzureDevOpsProject)<-[:HAS_PROJECT]-(:AzureDevOpsOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID}) WHERE n.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (n) return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted

MATCH (:AzureDevOpsRepo)<-[r:HAS_REPO]-(:AzureDevOpsProject)<-[:HAS_PROJECT]-(:AzureDevOpsOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID}) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r) return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
